sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ التَّمْرُ وَزَيْتُ الزَّيْتُونِ مِنَ الرَّكائِزِ الْأَسَاسِيَّةِ فِي النِّظَامِ الْغِذَائِيِّ لِسُكَّانِ حَوْضِ الْبَحْرِ الْأَبْيَضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ.
sentences.translation: Hurme i maslinovo ulje smatraju se osnovnim stubovima u ishrani stanovnika mediteranskog bazena.
sentences.translationEn: Dates and olive oil are considered fundamental pillars in the diet of the Mediterranean basin inhabitants.

sentences.arabic: يَمْتَازُ التَّمْرُ بِكَوْنِهِ مَصْدَرًا طَبِيعِيًّا لِلطَّاقَةِ، إِذْ يَحْتَوِي عَلَى نِسْبَةٍ عَالِيَةٍ مِنَ الْأَلْيَافِ وَالْمَعَادِنِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Hurme se odlikuju time što su prirodni izvor energije, jer sadrže visok procenat vlakana i minerala neophodnih za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Dates are distinguished by being a natural source of energy, as they contain a high percentage of fiber and minerals essential for the body.

sentences.arabic: أَمَّا زَيْتُ الزَّيْتُونِ، فَقَدْ أَثْبَتَتِ الدِّرَاسَاتُ الْعِلْمِيَّةُ دَوْرَهُ الْفَعَّالَ فِي حِمَايَةِ الْقَلْبِ وَتَعْزِيزِ الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Što se tiče maslinovog ulja, naučne studije su dokazale njegovu efikasnu ulogu u zaštiti srca i unapređenju opšteg zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: As for olive oil, scientific studies have proven its effective role in protecting the heart and promoting general health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ خُبَرَاءُ التَّغْذِيَةِ بِدَمْجِ هَذِهِ الْمَكَوِّنَاتِ فِي الْوَجَبَاتِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ لِلْوِقَايَةِ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nutricionisti savjetuju uključivanje ovih sastojaka u svakodnevne obroke radi prevencije hroničnih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Nutrition experts advise integrating these ingredients into daily meals to prevent chronic diseases.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاعْتِمَادَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ يُعَبِّرُ عَنْ وَعْيٍ صِحِّيٍّ يَتَوَارَثُهُ الْأَجْيَالُ مُنْذُ الْقِدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Oslanjanje na ove prirodne namirnice izražava zdravstvenu svijest koju generacije nasljeđuju od davnina.
sentences.translationEn: Relying on these natural foods expresses a health awareness that generations have inherited since ancient times.
